name: SearchConditionComparison
summary: Specifies comparison operator used to see whether a SearchCondition will match

enum_values.name: HasCategory
enum_values.summary: Matches if item has specified category

enum_values.name: NotHasCategory
enum_values.summary: Matches if item does not have specified category

enum_values.name: HasProperty
enum_values.summary: Matches if item has the specified property in the specified category

enum_values.name: NotHasProperty
enum_values.summary: Matches if item does not have the specified property in the specified category

enum_values.name: SameType
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists and value has the same VariantDataType

enum_values.name: Equal
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists and has the same value

enum_values.name: NotEqual
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists and does not have the same value

enum_values.name: NumericLessThan
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, has the same numeric VariantDataType (Int32, AnyDouble, DateTime) and property value less than condition value

enum_values.name: NumericLessThanOrEqual
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, has the same numeric VariantDataType (Int32, AnyDouble, DateTime) and property value less than or equal to condition value

enum_values.name: NumericGreaterThanOrEqual
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, has the same numeric VariantDataType (Int32, AnyDouble, DateTime) and property value greater than or equal to condition value

enum_values.name: NumericGreaterThan
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, has the same numeric VariantDataType (Int32, AnyDouble, DateTime) and property value greater than condition value

enum_values.name: DisplayStringContains
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, is of DisplayString type and contains the display string in condition value

enum_values.name: DisplayStringWildcard
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, is of DisplayString type and matches the wildcard display string in condition value

enum_values.name: DateTimeWithinDay
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, is of DateTime type and is within one day prior to the DateTime in condition value

enum_values.name: DateTimeWithinWeek
enum_values.summary: Matches if specified property exists, is of DateTime type and is within one week prior to the DateTime in condition value
